member_long_descriptions: Rectangular dark-brown wooden picture frame with a gilded inner trim and varnished finish, enclosing a glass-covered seascape print of sailboats; the frame shows minor scuffs and edge wear and there is slight reflection on the glass — photographed at approximately 1.5 m from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Rectangular dark-brown wooden picture frame with a gilded inner trim and varnished finish, enclosing a glass-covered seascape print of sailboats; the frame shows minor scuffs and edge wear and there is slight reflection on the glass — photographed at approximately 1.5 m from the camera.
